parsed.clarification_question: What specific help do you need with this section? Choose one: (a) Conceptual reconstruction (R1.1), (b) Logical consistency (R1.2), (c) Evidence-claim alignment (R1.3), (d) Novelty assessment (R1.4), (e) Structural reorganization (R1.5), (f) Writing polish (R1.6), (g) Citation and scholarship (R1.7).

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in any research writing assistance to ensure responsible communication of limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent invalidation of the delegation through exaggerated or unsupported statements.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep the assistance within the intended boundaries of the section's content.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate potential negative impacts from the medical imaging research described.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain accountability for sources and changes in the draft.
